text.title: Agent Eval Cost Budget Policy Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying agent-eval-cost-budget-policy must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: Examples in PR run (≤20% of full).

forbidden.pattern: No random PR subset — must be stratified.
No hard halt without judge fallback.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
